prose: The HOMO–LUMO gap of benzene was computed to be 6.6310857 eV using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (density fitting on, tier 'standard') in PySCF. Geometry source: pre-supplied XYZ coordinates for benzene with 12 atoms, applied in the gas phase without relaxation. Calculation converged in 8 SCF cycles, with no warnings or fallbacks reported. The live log file was `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpg1qb7rfq/live.json` (available upon request).
